languages.text: Изимонд готов на любые крайности, лишь бы его род получил титул.

traits.locale_text: Изимонд готов на любые крайности, лишь бы его род получил титул.

languages.text: Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.
languages.original_text: Изимонд готов на любые крайности, лишь бы его род получил титул.

traits.locale_text: Isimond is prepared to go to any extreme to secure his house's ascension to the title.
Isimond is prepared to go to any extreme to secure his house's ascension to the title.
Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.
Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.

languages.text: Isimond ist zu allem bereit, um seinem Haus den Titel zu sichern.
languages.original_text: Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.

traits.locale_text: Isimond ist zu allem bereit, um seinem Haus den Titel zu sichern.

languages.text: Isimond est prêt à tout pour s'assurer que sa maison obtienne le titre.
languages.original_text: Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.

traits.locale_text: Isimond est prêt à tout pour s'assurer que sa maison obtienne le titre.

languages.text: 伊西蒙德愿意不惜一切代价，确保他的家族获得头衔。
languages.original_text: Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.

traits.locale_text: 伊西蒙德愿意不惜一切代价，确保他的家族获得头衔。

languages.text: Isimond está dispuesto a hacer cualquier cosa con tal de asegurarse de que se otorgue el título a su familia.
languages.original_text: Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.

traits.locale_text: Isimond está dispuesto a hacer cualquier cosa con tal de asegurarse de que se otorgue el título a su familia.

languages.text: イシモンドは家族にタイトルを与えるためなら、どんな極端なことも厭わない。
languages.original_text: Isimond is willing to go to any extreme to get his family a title.

languages.text: İsimond, hanesinin ünvanı almasını sağlamak için her şeyi yapmaya hazır.
languages.original_text: Isimond is prepared to go to any lengths to ensure his house receives the title.

traits.locale_text: İsimond, hanesinin ünvanı almasını sağlamak için her şeyi yapmaya hazır.
